items.title: Jeff Bezos Predicts Gigawatt-Scale Orbital Data Centers In 10–20 Years, Compares AI Boom To Early 2000s Dot-Com Era

items.title: Amazon Launches New ‘Amazon Grocery’ Private Label, Unifies Fresh & Happy Belly Brands
items.description: Amazon.com Inc. (NASDAQ:AMZN) is one of the best American stocks to buy and hold for the next 3 years. On October 1, Amazon announced the launch of a new private label brand, Amazon Grocery. This new brand unifies existing customer-favorite private labels, Amazon Fresh and Happy Belly, into one cohesive collection of grocery essentials. The […]
